# DNI Validator — Generated by Karajan Code

This code was generated entirely by `kj run` in a single command. No human wrote a line.

## What happened

```bash
kj run "Create validateDNI(input): check format (8 digits + letter), validate letter with modulo-23, return {valid, error}. Include vitest tests." --no-sonar
```

Karajan:
1. Triaged the task as "simple" and auto-detected vitest
2. Wrote 10 tests first (TDD)
3. Implemented `validateDNI()` to pass all tests
4. Reviewed and approved the code

Total time: ~90 seconds. Zero configuration.

## Try it yourself

```bash
cd examples/dni-validator
npm install
npm test
```
